$meta.description: Explicit false-positive anchors for the semantic safety pre-filter (BGE-small-en-v1.5 calibrated). Covers: (1) idioms with crisis vocabulary (die, kill, hurt, disappear) that are NOT self-harm expressions; (2) real-world benign inputs identified in post_imp23 harness run as false positives at the old 0.55 threshold. When a message scores ≥0.70 against safe anchors, the FORCE_CRISIS hard threshold is raised from 0.75 to 0.95. Expanded 2026-05-29 to cover harness false-positive cases.
